confidenceNote: Overnight slide in US indexes and weak Asian morning markets indicate a negative opening.

bullets.title: US Tech Selloff Overnight
bullets.globalTrend: Nasdaq 100 fell 1.65% overnight as investors booked profits in high-flying chipmaker stocks.
bullets.globalTrendSimple: American technology companies faced a selling wave last night, dropping by 1.65%.
bullets.indianImpact: Heavy selling pressure expected on local IT exporters and hardware manufacturers.
bullets.indianImpactSimple: Local technology stocks are likely to see early price cuts as foreign selling dominates.

companiesAffected.name: Infosys Ltd.
companiesAffected.reason: Tech sector sentiment dampened by sharp decline in US NASDAQ index.
companiesAffected.actionableGuidance: Maintain a strict stop-loss and avoid buying dips immediately.

suggestedAction.strategy: Nifty expected to open down. Look to buy quality defensive shares only near deep support zones.
suggestedAction.strategySimple: Expect a lower start today. Avoid buying stocks immediately; let the selling pressure cool down.
suggestedAction.sectorFocus: Avoid IT and high-beta metal names. Focus on consumer stables.
suggestedAction.riskWarning: Heightened volatility due to heavy foreign institutional investor selling.
suggestedAction.riskWarningSimple: Big foreign investors might sell, causing prices to swing. Keep your stop losses active.
